derivation_inputs: git diff --name-only (manual scope list for H1a)

guarantees: RLS prevents cross-tenant reads/writes for authenticated callers based on JWT tenant claim.
non_guarantees: Does not prove multi-tenant role/RBAC separation beyond tenant_id isolation.

verification.runtime_negative_test: h1a-appointments-tenant-isolation.ps1 covers anon + cross-tenant + spoofed tenant_id scenarios; see outputs/h1a_verification_result.json.
verification.tenant_boundary_analysis: RLS policies + edge audit recorded; see db_appointments_policies.txt and edge_function_audit.json.
verification.rollback_plan: Revert by dropping appointment policies and disabling RLS via a rollback migration (LOCAL only). Pre-change artifacts captured in artifacts/tenants/tvg/runs/h1a_appointments_rls_20260418_101415/.

summary: Enable RLS + tenant-scoped policies on public.appointments and ensure appointment-related edge functions derive tenant scope from verified JWT claims (never request body). Verified via local harness with positive and negative tenant isolation tests.

findings.verification_method: Local harness executes REST and edge negative tests.
findings.title: public.appointments lacked RLS coverage in canonical migrations
findings.rule_violated: tenant_isolation: scheduling SSOT must be tenant-scoped at DB layer
findings.business_impact: Potential tenant bleed via direct PostgREST access if JWT tenant claim is ignored by DB.
findings.recommended_action: Enable RLS + tenant-scoped SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE policies; verify runtime negative tests.

findings.verification_method: Harness asserts tenant mismatch returns 403 for service_role automation and edge write paths.
findings.title: Service-role edge functions can bypass RLS unless tenant is enforced from verified JWT
findings.rule_violated: tenant_isolation: service_role must not trust client-scoped tenant inputs
findings.business_impact: Edge functions could become cross-tenant write path if they trust body tenant_id or skip tenant filters.
findings.recommended_action: Derive tenantId from verified JWT claims; reject mismatched body.tenant_id; enforce tenant filters on service_role queries.

title: H1a (tenant_isolation): RLS coverage + edge tenant enforcement for public.appointments

artifacts.label: create-appointment tenant enforcement
artifacts.snippet: IMPORTANT: Do not trust client-provided tenant_id.

scenarios.verification_method: RLS policies enforced via REST insert/read in harness.
scenarios.scenario: Concurrent appointment inserts with different tenants
scenarios.expected_behavior: Each insert is isolated to caller tenant; no cross-tenant visibility.

scenarios.verification_method: Harness calls create-appointment with TenantB JWT + body.tenant_id=TenantA.
scenarios.scenario: Edge create-appointment rejects spoofed tenant_id on retry
scenarios.expected_behavior: Retry with mismatched tenant_id is rejected (403) or ignored; cannot write cross-tenant.

scenarios.verification_method: Harness GET as anon returns 0 rows or error.
Code inspection + harness edge calls; audit output.
scenarios.scenario: Edge runtime uses caller JWT for RLS lane
scenarios.expected_behavior: Functions that must enforce RLS construct client with anon key + caller JWT; service_role is not used for appointment writes.

scenarios.verification_method: Harness covers mismatch; code rejects mismatch.
scenarios.scenario: Operator attempts to pass tenant_id in request body
scenarios.expected_behavior: Mismatch is rejected; match is optional and not trusted as authority.

uncertainty_boundaries: Other tables may still lack RLS (out of H1a scope).
service_role paths rely on explicit tenant filters; DB cannot enforce RLS under service_role.
